name: local-live-music-tracker
description: Root orchestrator for MKE Setlist scraper and frontend

scripts.db:init: sqlite3 data/localmusic.db < packages/db/schema.sql && sqlite3 data/localmusic.db < packages/db/seed.sql
scripts.ci:local: pnpm run setup && pnpm turbo run lint && pnpm turbo run build && pnpm turbo run test
scripts.ci:local:ui: pnpm run setup && turbo run lint --filter=@open-setlist/config-tailwind... --filter=@open-setlist/ui... && pnpm --filter=@open-setlist/ui run build-storybook && pnpm --filter=@open-setlist/ui run test:a11y:ci && turbo run build && turbo run test
